entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Bhavya_ValidationRule Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE ManagedAttribute PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <ManagedAttribute aggregated="true" attribute="memberOf" created="1738600647343" displayName="AccountsPayable" hash="507c5a6c171a588eec318e4c1caae35ee8673507" id="c0a800fc94cb1e358194ccac8aaf2829" lastRefresh="1749572753990" modified="1758609207715" requestable="true" significantModified="1758609207715" type="group" uuid="{7a101b4d-d8cf-4eb0-b0a2-ccad46e20135}" value="CN=AccountsPayable,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"> <ApplicationRef> <Reference class="sailpoint.object.Application" id="ActiveDirectory" name="ActiveDirectory"/> </ApplicationRef> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="GroupScope" value="Global"/> <entry key="GroupType" value="Security"/> <entry key="NetBIOSName"/> <entry key="cn" value="AccountsPayable"/> <entry key="memberOf"> <value> <List> <String>CN=Benefits,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com</String> <String>CN=Buyer,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com</String> </List> </value> </entry> <entry key="msDS-PrincipalName" value="ESHIAM\AccountsPayable"/> <entry key="objectSid" value="S-1-5-21-2678700903-2778472132-3948167259-1110"/> <entry key="objectguid" value="{7a101b4d-d8cf-4eb0-b0a2-ccad46e20135}"/> <entry key="sAMAccountName" value="AccountsPayable"/> <entry key="sysDescriptions"> <value> <Map> <entry key="en_US"/> </Map> </value> </entry> </Map> </Attributes> <Inheritance> <Reference class="sailpoint.object.ManagedAttribute" id="c0a800fc94cb1e358194ccac8b66282f"/> <Reference class="sailpoint.object.ManagedAttribute" id="c0a800fc94cb1e358194ccac8b762830"/> </Inheritance> </ManagedAttribute>
